Before You Order

Got questions?
Honest answers.

Everything women ask before trying Luna Nord — answered directly.

Will the weight press on my eyes?
No. The glass beads sit around your eye socket — not on your eyelids. Pressure lands on your temples and nose bridge, where it triggers your body's natural calm response. Your eyes have full space inside. "I was nervous too. First night in I forgot I was wearing it." — Sofia M.
Is it truly blackout?
Yes. The weighted design lets the mask mold to your nose bridge — no gaps where light sneaks in. Unlike flat masks that float above your face, Luna Nord seals completely. Streetlights, partner's phone, sunrise — none of it gets through.
I sleep on my side — will it stay on?
Yes. The adjustable strap is designed for women — no hair pulling, no headaches. The weight distributes evenly when you turn, so it stays in place all night whether you're on your side, back, or stomach. 87% of customers say it stays on all night vs. 42% with standard masks.
I run hot at night — will this make it worse?
No. Luna Nord only covers your eyes — so there's no heat buildup. The fabric is breathable and hypoallergenic. For hot nights, pop it in the fridge for 10 minutes before bed for instant cooling relief.
How do I clean it?
Easy. The outer cover zips off and is machine washable — cold gentle cycle, lay flat to dry. The weighted insert stays dry. Takes about 90 seconds to remove and reattach.
When will I receive my order?
Orders ship within 1–2 business days. Standard delivery takes 5–8 days and you'll get a tracking link by email as soon as it leaves our warehouse.
What if it doesn't work for me?
You're covered by our 60-Night Sleep Better Guarantee. If Luna Nord doesn't improve your sleep within 60 nights, we'll refund you in full — no questions, no hassle. You have two full months to decide.

Still unsure? You have 60 nights to try Luna Nord completely risk-free. If you don't sleep better, you pay nothing.

60-Night Guarantee  ·  Free Shipping  ·  2,847+ happy customers

Your Questions Answered

Still Not Sure If Luna Nord Is Right for You?

Here are the questions 2,847+ women asked before trying Luna Nord risk-free.

Will the weight press on my eyes?
No. The 30g of gentle weight is distributed around your eye socket—not on your eyes. It applies pressure to your facial muscles and forehead (similar to a spa eye treatment), which activates your parasympathetic nervous system without touching your eyelids. "I was worried about this too! It feels like a gentle hug, not pressure." — Emma L.
Is it 100% blackout?
Yes. Unlike standard silk masks, the weighted design allows Luna Nord to contour perfectly around your nose bridge—eliminating those annoying gaps where streetlamp light usually sneaks in. Even with your partner's phone glowing at 3am, you'll stay in total darkness.
Can I sleep on my side?
Absolutely. The adjustable strap is designed for women (not a unisex elastic repackaged). It stays secure without pulling your hair. The weighted beads distribute evenly, so whether you sleep on your back, side, or stomach, the mask stays in place. 87% of customers report the mask stays on all night vs. 42% with standard masks.
Won't it get too hot?
No. Luna Nord uses breathable mulberry silk and includes a cooling gel insert. Unlike weighted blankets that trap heat, the mask only covers your eyes—so you get the calming pressure without overheating.
How do I wash it?
Easy. The soft outer cover is fully removable and machine washable. Just remove the weighted/gel insert, wash the cover on a gentle cycle, and lay flat to dry.
Can I use it for migraines?
Yes! The cooling gel side + gentle pressure make Luna Nord perfect for migraine relief and reducing morning puffiness. Place the mask in the freezer for 15 minutes before use for spa-level relief.
What if it doesn't work for me?
We're confident you'll love it, but if Luna Nord doesn't give you the best sleep of your life within 30 nights, we'll give you a full refund—no questions asked. You risk nothing.

Still have questions? Try Luna Nord risk-free for 30 nights. If you don't fall asleep faster, we'll refund you immediately.
